name: Write Vault File
description: Write a file to the user's health vault. Creates the file if it does not exist; overwrites if it does. Use vault:mkdir first to create parent directories.
creator: Covia

content.description: Text content to write (use this OR asset, not both)

asset.description: Asset reference to write as file content (e.g. '/a/0x1234...', DID URL). Streams binary directly.

created.description: True if file was newly created
